revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.text: {{documentation subpage}} <includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> [[als:Vorlage:SGP]] [[ar:قالب:سنغافورة]] [[ast:Plantilla:SGP]] [[bn:টেমপ্লেট:SGP]] [[de:Vorlage:SGP]] [[el:Πρότυπο:SGP]] [[es:Plantilla:SGP]] [[eu:Txantiloi:SGP]] [[fr:Modèle:Singapour]] [[gl:Template:SGP]] [[hy:Կաղապար:SGP]] [[ko:틀:SGP]] [[id:Templat:SGP]] [[lb:Template:SGP]] [[ja:Template:SGP]] [[pt:Predefinição:SGP]] [[qu:Plantilla:SGP]] [[ru:Шаблон:SGP]] [[sk:Šablóna:SGP]] [[sl:Predloga:SGP]] [[th:แม่แบบ:SGP]] [[uk:Шаблон:SGP]] [[zh:Template:SGP]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6079507)

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23582763848|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 23 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
